task_completion.description: Navigate to the location of Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is centered on the coast of Dubai, specifically the Palm Jumeirah area (approx coordinates 25.1124, 55.1390).
The Historical Imagery toolbar (time slider) is visible in the top-left corner of the map view.

task_completion.description: Set the time slider to the year 2002 or earlier
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date displayed on the historical imagery time slider reads '2002' or an earlier year (e.g., '2001').

task_completion.description: Verify the map shows early construction or pre-construction imagery
task_completion.visual_evidence: The visual content of the map shows the early stages of land reclamation (sand formations) or open water, distinct from the completed Palm Jumeirah structure. It matches the appearance of the site in 2001-2002.

task_completion.description: Save the screenshot to the specified path with the time slider visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog, terminal command, or file manager view confirms the file is being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/palm_jumeirah_2002.jpg'. The view being saved (or the screen at the time of saving) includes the visible time slider.

integrity.description: Agent uses a dedicated mapping application (e.g., Google Earth Pro)
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements (sidebar, toolbar, compass) belong to a mapping application like Google Earth Pro, not a web browser image search.

integrity.description: Agent does not download a pre-existing image from the internet
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen using a web browser to search for 'Palm Jumeirah 2002 screenshot' or using `wget`/`curl` to download an image file.

integrity.description: The imagery is rendered by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The map view responds to the agent's interaction (zooming, panning, slider movement), indicating it is not a static image file opened in an image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Palm Jumeirah is located at 25.1124°N, 55.1390°E. Construction began in June 2001. Imagery from 2002 or earlier should show early land reclamation (sand spits) or the pre-construction coastline, but not the fully formed fronds or buildings found in modern imagery.
